name_en: L⊚℮w℮🌟mini Suede Pebble Bucket Bag. Merges pure minimalist lines with striking design style, creating a unique innovative handbag design. The iconic Anagram engraved hardware serves both decorative and practical functions, with an adjustable shoulder strap length suitable for various carrying methods, and the unique twisted structure complements subtle details. This mini version is made of soft suede. Crossbody*Shoulder or Handbag*Adjustable Detachable Shoulder Strap*Magnetic Snap Closure*Interior Pocket*Synthetic Leather Lining*Anagram Engraved Pebble.
